text: My name is Diogo Leal. It is a pleasure to meet you.
What projects are you working on?
Good morning, Sophia. Shall we begin?
Good morning, Diogo. Yes, let's start.
Great. Let me outline the agenda. We have three topics today.
Sounds good. Could you share the main objective first?
Of course. Our objective is to plan the launch. Please take a look at the agenda.
Perfect. I will take the minutes while you facilitate.
Good morning, everyone. Shall we begin?
Our main objective is to plan the launch.
Could you share your update, please?
Let's proceed to the next point.

Hi Diogo, this is Sophia. I am calling about the project kickoff meeting tomorrow at ten. You are leading it, so please prepare a short agenda. We should cover three main topics: the objective, the timeline, and the team roles. Could you also outline the next steps at the end? Remember to facilitate the discussion and make sure everyone can speak. Please ask Marco to take the minutes. Let us keep the meeting to forty-five minutes. Thank you, and good luck. Talk to you tomorrow.

Good morning, everyone, and thank you for joining. Let us kick off the meeting. Today our main objective is to plan the new launch. I will facilitate the discussion, and Marco will take the minutes. Let me outline our agenda: first, the timeline; second, the team roles; and third, the budget. We should cover each point in about ten minutes. Could everyone please share one update? Then we will proceed to the action items. Feel free to ask questions at any time. Let us begin.

Diogo opens the agenda and writes the objective. He kicks off the meeting with a warm greeting. He outlines the three main topics. He asks each colleague to share an update. Finally, he proceeds to the action items and ends on time.
